title: As an admin, i would like the ability to program emails and assigns to people not currently assigned to a beta board
excerpt:
I would like to be able to setup automations and integrations to notify or email a particular person or group in a beta board, without actually adding the people to these boards until they are ready to be released. 
Othe…

posts.author: HAMondayAdmin (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to setup automations and integrations to notify or email a particular person or group in a beta board, without actually adding the people to these boards until they are ready to be released.
Otherwise I then have to remember to change the function after the board is ready for release.
